targets.rawSql: WITH settled AS (SELECT match_id, AVG((P_true->>'home_win')::float - CASE WHEN (payload->>'winner') = 'home' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS brier FROM tick_snapshots ts JOIN event_log el ON ts.match_id = el.match_id AND el.event_type = 'match_result' GROUP BY ts.match_id ORDER BY MAX(ts.t) DESC LIMIT 20) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS time, brier FROM settled
SELECT created_at AS time, realized_pnl / NULLIF(entry_price * quantity, 0) AS edge_real FROM positions WHERE status = 'SETTLED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT created_at AS time, direction, realized_pnl / NULLIF(entry_price * quantity, 0) AS edge_real FROM positions WHERE status = 'SETTLED' AND direction IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 40
SELECT version, created_at, is_active, validation_metrics::text FROM production_params ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ms.league_id::text AS league, AVG(POWER((ts.P_true->>'home_win')::float - CASE WHEN p.direction = 'BUY_YES' AND p.realized_pnl > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END, 2)) AS brier FROM tick_snapshots ts JOIN positions p ON ts.match_id = p.match_id JOIN match_schedule ms ON ts.match_id = ms.match_id WHERE p.status = 'SETTLED' GROUP BY ms.league_id
SELECT (SELECT AVG(realized_pnl) FROM positions WHERE status = 'SETTLED') - 0 AS alignment_value
